generated_oml:
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214x214x3mm) actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current handling, controlled by low-level driver from RabbitMQ"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02m³/s) actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current handling, controlled by low-level driver from RabbitMQ"
]

instance InternalHotSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor at hottest point inside incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance InternalColdSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor at coldest point inside incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance ExternalRoomSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor for external room temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ as messages"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalHotSensor, InternalColdSensor, ExternalRoomSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Record of temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors for processing in digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP-based message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService, BangBangControlService, SimulationService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for GPIO control of actuators and sensor reading"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService, BangBangControlService, SimulationService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for MOSFET and optocoupler circuitry"
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDesignService
]

instance DS18S20SensorLibraries : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor libraries for 1-Wire communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using dynamic thermal models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization to update parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResult
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation based on temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulations to reproduce physical behavior for predictive analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]

instance HardwareDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for designing physical hardware circuitry"
    DTDFVocab:provides HardwareDesignResult
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature predictions from DT models used to inform bang-bang control decisions"
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control decision for heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C) parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for predictive analysis and optimization of thermal behavior"
]

instance CalibrationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration result with updated model parameters for improved prediction accuracy"
]

instance HardwareDesignResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Hardware design for MOSFET and optocoupler circuitry"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03m³ air volume)"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Hardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, InternalHotSensor, InternalColdSensor, ExternalRoomSensor, RaspberryPi4Hardware, PCBWithMOSFETsOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends heating/fan control commands to RabbitMQ server; low-level driver consumes these messages to actuate MOSFET-driven heatbed and fan via Raspberry Pi GPIO, with safe protocol enforcement for operational safety."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of PT hardware (incubator components), DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, thermal models), and communication flow where PT sensor data feeds into DT models via RabbitMQ, and DT control commands drive PT actuators through the same channel."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated by comparing predicted temperatures with experimental data; residual error minimized via Scipy optimization; assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature distribution, heat transfer) tested through sensor placement experiments and voltage-adjusted fan tests."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server (AMQP protocol) deployed on Raspberry Pi for synchronous communication; PT components (sensors/actuators) interact with DT via message queues, with low-level driver and controller listening to RabbitMQ topics for data/command exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; all DT components deployed on-premises with no cloud infrastructure mentioned."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to maintain operational safety; no specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols detailed."
]
